tasks.description: Change the default downscaling method in Downscaler from NEAREST to BOX to preserve color details and reduce aliasing artifacts.

steps.description: Update src/modules/post_processing/downscaler.py to use Image.BOX instead of Image.NEAREST for downscaling
Update unit tests in tests/modules/post_processing/test_downscaler.py to reflect the new resampling behavior

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Downscaler.downscale uses Image.BOX. Tests confirm that downscaling produces expected dimensions and output quality improves (verified via existing test metrics or new visual check).

unit: Downscaler.downscale returns correct size image using Image.BOX
Downscaler.downscale handles non-square images correctly with center crop before resize

tasks.description: Modify FullPipelineConfig to set default palette_preset to None, disabling forced 16-color quantization by default.

steps.description: Update FullPipelineConfig in src/modules/full_pipeline/schemas.py to set default palette_preset=None
Update main.py CLI argument parser to default --palette to None
Update unit tests to verify that no palette is applied by default

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Default configuration has palette_preset=None. Running without --palette argument preserves original colors. Passing --palette still works as before.

unit: PostProcessingPipeline.process without palette inputs skips quantization step

tasks.description: Change the default target sizes from [32, 64] to [64, 128] in FullPipelineConfig and CLI.

steps.description: Update FullPipelineConfig.target_sizes default value in src/modules/full_pipeline/schemas.py
Update default value for --sizes argument in main.py build_parser
Update relevant tests that rely on default sizes

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Default output sizes are [64, 128]. CLI help text reflects new defaults.

unit: main.py --help output shows new default sizes

tasks.description: Add --no-post-processing CLI flag and configuration option to skip the post-processing stage entirely and output raw pixelization results.

steps.description: Add skip_post_processing boolean field to FullPipelineConfig
Update FullPipeline.run in orchestrator.py to check this flag and skip POST_PROCESSING stage if True
Verify orchestrator outputs the pixelization image path as the final result when post-processing is skipped

tasks.acceptance-criteria: Passing --no-post-processing skips the post-processing stage. The final output path is the result from the Pixelization stage.

unit: FullPipeline.run with skip_post_processing=True breaks loop after PIXELIZATION stage
integration: Run pipeline with --no-post-processing and verify output is the 1024x1024 image from pixelization
